Librarius.name: Psionic Scourge
Librarius.effect: Roll 1D6 and add the caster's Ld score. The target suffers one automatic wound for each point of difference to its own Ld value. Seeking.

Librarius.name: Fury of the Ancients
Librarius.effect: The target suffers five hits with Strength: 6 AP: -2 D: 1; Seeking.

Librarius.name: Power of Heroes
Librarius.effect: The target gains +2 Strength and +2 Attacks.

Librarius.name: Psionic Fortress
Librarius.effect: The target gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Librarius.name: Null Zone
Librarius.effect: All enemy units in range lose their invulnerability saving throw. Psychic test results from enemy units are halved.

Geokinesis (Legacy).name: Aspect of Stone
Geokinesis (Legacy).effect: The target gains +3 Strength and +3 Toughness.

Geokinesis (Legacy).name: Fortify
Geokinesis (Legacy).effect: The target improves its Saving throw by +1.

Geokinesis (Legacy).name: Iron Inferno
Geokinesis (Legacy).effect: The target suffers one automatic hit per model with S: 3 AP: 0 D: 1; Armor piercing(5+), Grav, Seeking.

Geokinesis (Legacy).name: Tectonic Purge
Geokinesis (Legacy).effect: Reduce enemy Charge movements that target the model or its attached unit by 4".

Geokinesis (Legacy).name: Wrack and Ruin
Geokinesis (Legacy).effect: The enemy unit must make two Dangerous Terrain tests.

Geokinesis (Legacy).name: Chasm
Geokinesis (Legacy).effect: Select a target and roll 2D6 - (the target's current Movement value). It suffers the difference in Mortal Wounds.

Interromancy (Legacy).name: Aversion
Interromancy (Legacy).effect: The target gains the (cumulative) "Deflect" and "Parry" abilities.

Interromancy (Legacy).name: Engulfing Fear
Interromancy (Legacy).effect: The target must pass a Leadership test with a -2 penalty.

Interromancy (Legacy).name: Mind Spike
Interromancy (Legacy).effect: The target suffers one Mortal Wound.

Interromancy (Legacy).name: Righteous Repugnance
Interromancy (Legacy).effect: The target receives a +1 bonus to all hit rolls.

Interromancy (Legacy).name: Mind Wipe
Interromancy (Legacy).effect: Assign a randomly chosen command face down to the target.

Sanguine (Legacy).name: Burning Blood
Sanguine (Legacy).effect: Roll 2D6 and subtract the average Toughness value of the target unit. It suffers the difference in automatic wounds with Strength: 4 AP: 0 D: 1; Seeking.

Sanguine (Legacy).name: Unleashed Rage
Sanguine (Legacy).effect: All models of the target gain the "Berserker(5+)" and "Blind Rage" abilities.

Sanguine (Legacy).name: Angelic Sword
Sanguine (Legacy).effect: The target gains +4 Strength and +2 Attacks.

Sanguine (Legacy).name: Angelic Wings
Sanguine (Legacy).effect: The target unit gains +6" Movement, +1 Initiative and the "Anti-Grav" ability.

Sanguine (Legacy).name: Blood Lance
Sanguine (Legacy).effect: Draw a straight line 1" wide from the caster to any target point within 18". All enemy models this line passes through suffer one automatic hit with Strength: 8 AP: -2 D: 2; AT(2), Lance(1), Seeking. Vehicles are hit twice.

Sanguine (Legacy).name: Sanguine Shield
Sanguine (Legacy).effect: The target unit gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Stormspeaking (Legacy).name: Blasting Gale
Stormspeaking (Legacy).effect: The target's Movement is halved, rounding up.

Stormspeaking (Legacy).name: Eye of the Storm
Stormspeaking (Legacy).effect: Roll 1D6 for each enemy unit in range, adding +1 if the unit is a Flyer or has Anti-Grav. On a 3+, the unit suffers one Mortal Wound.

Stormspeaking (Legacy).name: Lightning Call
Stormspeaking (Legacy).effect: The target suffers 2D6 hits with Strength: 7 AP: -2 D: 1; AT(1), Seeking.

Stormspeaking (Legacy).name: Ride the Winds
Stormspeaking (Legacy).effect: The target gains the "Frenzy(2")" and "Haste(2")" abilities.

Stormspeaking (Legacy).name: Spirits of Chogoris
Stormspeaking (Legacy).effect: The target receives a -1 penalty to their Leadership and to all hit rolls.

Stormspeaking (Legacy).name: Storm-Wreathed
Stormspeaking (Legacy).effect: The target of this unit's charge moves may not use Defensive Reactions.

Tempestus (Legacy).name: Awoken Instincts
Tempestus (Legacy).effect: The target gains the "Favoured enemy", "Furious charge" and "Move through cover" abilities.

Tempestus (Legacy).name: Hurricane
Tempestus (Legacy).effect: The enemy unit must make a Dangerous Terrain test the next time it activates, and its movement is hindered accordingly. Also affects units that normally ignore terrain or remain stationary.

Tempestus (Legacy).name: Lightning Strike
Tempestus (Legacy).effect: The target suffers four hits with Strength: 7 AP: -2 D: 1; AT(1), Seeking.

Tempestus (Legacy).name: Maw of the World Wolf
Tempestus (Legacy).effect: Draw a straight 1" wide line from the caster in any direction. All creatures touched by the line must pass an initiative test or suffer one Mortal Wound. Vehicles suffer an automatic Hull point loss with no save allowed.

Tempestus (Legacy).name: Stormcaller
Tempestus (Legacy).effect: The target gains the benefit of cover.

Tempestus (Legacy).name: Thunderblast
Tempestus (Legacy).effect: All models of the target suffer an automatic wound with Strength: 4 AP: 0 D: 1; Seeking. Additionally, the target gains one Battleshock token.
